description_long: This object consists of a tall, rectangular wooden planter box with a smooth, light wood finish and a visible grain pattern on the top surface. The front face of the planter features an oval logo area with the word 'LOGO' inscribed, suggesting a customizable or commercial use. Emerging from the center of the planter is a decorative plant with long, narrow, pointed green leaves radiating outward in a dense, spiky arrangement. The plant is supported by a distinctive black spiral stem, which adds a modern, sculptural element to the design. The overall appearance is clean and contemporary, suitable for urban or commercial environments such as lobbies, sidewalks, or plazas. The combination of natural wood and vibrant greenery creates a visually appealing contrast.
description: A tall, light wood planter box with a spiral-stemmed green plant and a customizable logo area on the front. The design is modern and eye-catching, ideal for urban or commercial spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the logo area and the full display of the plant's spiral stem and radiating leaves.
description_view_1: Side view with the logo not visible, highlighting the rectangular shape and the plant's symmetrical leaf spread.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with the plant's leaves and spiral stem visible but no logo.
description_view_3: Rear view, showing the back of the planter and the plant's leaf arrangement without any logo or markings.
